creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
xmms - work is fine (except problem with tag editing, see bug 204515 ), but in the console I get warnings like this:

Gtk-WARNING **: Failed to load module "libgail.so": Shared object "libgail.so" not found, required by "xmms"
Gtk-WARNING **: Failed to load module "libatk-bridge.so": Shared object "libatk-bridge.so" not found, required by "xmms"

But this modules installed:
root@vladiom:/usr/local/lib/gtk-2.0/modules # ls -1
libatk-bridge.so
libcanberra-gtk-module.so
libferret.so
libgail.so

root@vladiom:~ # pkg info | grep xmms
xmms-1.2.11_27                 X Multimedia System -- audio player with Winamp GUI

root@vladiom:~ # uname -srm
FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p7 amd64
